name: Research
description: Run competitive analysis, market research, and due diligence. Monitor competitors, summarize trends, build prospect dossiers, and surface signals from the web. Outputs structured briefs, comparison tables, and watchlists — never posts or sends anything on your behalf.
author: Houston

agentSeeds..houston/routines/routines.json:
[{"id": "weekly-competitor-pulse", "name": "Weekly competitor pulse", "description": "Every Monday morning: checks each company on your watchlist for pricing changes, new features, funding news, and job postings. Only surfaces if something changed. Silent week = nothing moved.", "prompt": "Run the weekly competitor pulse.

For each company in watchlist.json:
1. Re-scrape their homepage and pricing page via Firecrawl.
2. Pull last 7 days of news via Perplexity: "{company}" (pricing OR launch OR feature OR funding OR layoffs OR hiring).
3. Compare to the baseline in briefs/{slug}.md. What changed?

If anything changed for a company: write a concise update to watchlist-updates/{slug}-{today}.md. Note: what changed, source URL, date. Append to outputs.json type: "watchlist-update".

If nothing changed for a company: update last_checked in watchlist.json. Stay silent for that company.

After all companies checked: if ANY had changes, summarize them in chat (company name + what changed, one line each). If NONE changed, end with ROUTINE_OK.

On first run (watchlist.json empty): end with ROUTINE_OK.", "schedule": "0 8 * * 1", "enabled": true, "suppress_when_silent": true, "created_at": "2026-06-28T00:00:00Z", "updated_at": "2026-06-28T00:00:00Z"}, {"id": "monthly-market-digest", "name": "Monthly market digest", "description": "Every 1st of the month: summarizes the top 5 trends in your industry from the past 30 days. Always surfaces, even if quiet. A slow month is also useful signal.", "prompt": "Run the monthly market digest.

1. Read config/context-ledger.json. Get domains.market.primary_market. If not set, use domains.competitive.monitoring_keywords. If neither set, use "AI software tools" as default and note that I should set my industry in context.

2. Run track-a-trend for the primary market with scope=last-30-days.

3. Also check: any competitor on my watchlist that had activity this month (read watchlist-updates/ for this month). Surface their names with a one-line update.

4. Write digest to trends/monthly-digest-{YYYY-MM}.md. Append to outputs.json type: "monthly-digest".

5. Always surface in chat: month name + top 3 themes (one line each) + any watchlist companies that moved. Even if the month was quiet, say so.", "schedule": "0 8 1 * *", "enabled": true, "suppress_when_silent": false, "created_at": "2026-06-28T00:00:00Z", "updated_at": "2026-06-28T00:00:00Z"}]
